creator: akess@solarlottery.net
text:
12.0-p9 amd 64 and ngircd-25

I've noticed that the ngircd port hasn't been updated since Nov 2017.
Version 25 was released in Jan 2019. I wrote a distinfo file for myself so
I could install ngircd via the ports. 

TIMESTAMP = 1567705822
SHA256 (ngircd-25.tar.xz) = c4997cae3e3dd6ff6a605ca274268f2b8c9ba0b1a96792c7402e5594222eee4e
SIZE (ngircd-24.tar.xz) = 349124
